---
title: "<i class='bi bi-code-slash'></i> Web Projects"
description: "An overview of my Web Apps using Shiny. Most of them are hosted on shinyapps.io. I have also developed several APIs for some of my ML models."
link-external-newwindow: true
page-layout: full
comments: false
title-block-banner: true
css: ["s.css",  "../assets/styles/custom-style.css"]
listing:
  - id: dashboards
    type: custom
    template: list.ejs
    contents: "dashboards/**/index.qmd"
    sort: "order asc"
    include:
      lang: en  
  
  - id: shiny_web_apps
    type: custom
    template: list.ejs
    contents: "apps/**/index.qmd"
    include:
      lang: en

  - id: apis
    type: custom
    template: list.ejs
    contents: "apis/**/index.qmd"
    include:
      lang: en
toc: true
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    anchor-sections: true
---

```{=html}
<style>
h3 a{
  display: none;
}
</style>
```

## <i class="bi bi-activity"></i> Dashboards

Interactive dashboards that summarize and visualize data through charts, tables, and statistical metrics, providing a clear and structured overview for fast interpretation

::: {#dashboards}
:::


## <i class="bi bi-menu-app"></i> R Shiny Apps

Web applications that extend beyond traditional dashboards and descriptive statistics, enabling users to interact dynamically and perform specific tasks. Particular emphasis is placed on machine learning applications, where outputs or predictions are generated from trained models based on user inputs.

::: {#shiny_web_apps}
:::


## <i class="bi bi-braces"></i> APIs

APIs that expose statistical workflows, computations, or machine learning models without a user interface, enabling their integration into other applications.

::: {#apis}
:::
